common_marginals: every construction satisfies Pr(Y_i=1)=p_i before numerical approximation

action_components.partition: four-connected components of the action and its complement
action_components.evaluation: fixed-seed Monte Carlo with antithetic uniforms

proposal_components.partition: four-connected components of probability >= 0.10 plus complement
proposal_components.evaluation: fixed-seed Monte Carlo with antithetic uniforms
proposal_components.role: secondary; thresholds are all reported and never selected on test AURC

spatial_grid_control.partition: deterministic grid matched as closely as possible to the object-aligned block count
spatial_grid_control.evaluation: same Monte Carlo uniforms and budget as component coupling

independent_pixel_control.evaluation: fixed-seed Monte Carlo with antithetic uniforms

interpretation_limits: Dice is permutation-invariant; connectivity is an empirical posterior assumption, not a property implied by Dice.
Single-label test data compare selective ranking but do not identify the true conditional mask posterior.
Proposal thresholds and Monte Carlo repeats cannot be selected by test performance.
No dataset, model, or condition may be replaced after results are read.
